title: Subflow library
subtitle: Browse, create, and fork reusable subflows for your workflows.
error: Failed to load the subflow library.
empty: No subflows in this view yet.

tabHint.certified: Vendor-signed subflows. Read-only — fork one to make a tenant-owned copy.
tabHint.tenant: Subflows your tenant owns and may edit, publish, and deprecate.
tabHint.imported: Forked or imported subflows not yet published into your tenant library.

detail.empty: Select a subflow to see its details.
detail.interfaceHint: Public input and output ports the parent workflow connects to.
detail.portsHint: Ports are declared in the subflow editor.

deprecatedHint: Deprecated — hidden from the designer palette; kept here for history.

fork.title: Fork to tenant library
fork.body: This creates a tenant-owned, editable copy of "{{name}}" with a new subflow id. The copy no longer receives upstream pack updates.
fork.success: Forked to your tenant library as a new draft.

interface.title: Interface
interface.subtitle: Declare the public input and output ports of this subflow.
interface.missingName: Every port needs a name and type.

wiring.hint: Wire each declared port to a body node port to satisfy the interface contract.
wiring.inputLabel: Wire input "{{name}}" to a body node port
wiring.outputLabel: Wire output "{{name}}" from a body node port

mapping.title: Subflow ports
mapping.subtitle: Map this subflow's inputs to upstream outputs.
mapping.noInputs: This subflow declares no input ports.
mapping.noOutputs: This subflow declares no output ports.

bump.title: Bump subflow reference
bump.subtitle: Rewire "{{element}}" ({{subflowId}}) to a newer subflow revision. A new workflow draft is created; already-running instances keep their pinned revision.
bump.previewError: Could not compute the interface diff for this revision.
bump.applyError: Could not apply the bump. A breaking change needs every surface port remapped.
bump.noTarget: No newer published revision is available to bump to.
bump.breaking: Breaking interface change — remap the surface ports before saving.
bump.nonBreaking: Non-breaking change — the reference re-pins automatically.
bump.noChanges: The interface is unchanged between these revisions.
bump.blastEmpty: No other published workflows pin this subflow revision.
bump.remapHint: Map each input port of the target revision to an upstream output reference.
bump.success: Rewired to revision {{revision}} in a new draft. Publish the workflow to make it live.

bumpPicker.title: Choose a subflow to bump
bumpPicker.subtitle: This workflow embeds more than one subflow with a newer revision available. Pick which node to bump.
